$ 1 0.000005 10.20 50 5 43 5e-11
# Capacitive power supply
r 304 80 304 160 0 1000
c 304 80 480 80 0 2.2e-7 0 0.4
d 480 80 480 160 2 1N4007
z 480 160 480 240 2 12
w 304 160 480 160 0
w 480 240 304 240 0
w 304 240 304 320 0
g 304 320 304 400 0
# Push button and latch RC
s 160 160 160 80 0 0 false
r 160 80 304 80 0 2200000
c 240 160 240 240 0 0.001 0
w 160 160 240 160 0
w 240 160 304 160 0
w 240 240 304 240 0
# BC547 NPN
r 304 80 304 160 0 1000
t 304 160 368 160 0 1 -0.6 0.02 100
w 368 240 304 240 0
# BC557 PNP
r 480 160 480 200 0 1000
t 480 200 544 200 1 1 0.6 -0.02 100
w 544 160 480 160 0
# LED and gate resistor
r 544 240 544 300 0 1000
l 544 300 544 360 0 0 0
w 544 360 624 360 0
# Triac (modeled as switch)
w 624 80 624 360 0
w 624 240 700 240 0
r 700 80 700 240 0 100
w 700 80 624 80 0
g 624 400 624 440 0
